# **30% Cost Savings for DMA and Percolator clusters**

Status: *In progress*  Author: [Yi Chen](mailto:yichen@stripe.com)    Created: Jun 10, 2025  

# Announcement

To address rising costs in our most resource-intensive Spark clusters, the Data Infrastructure team launched a tuning experiment on June 20 targeting DMA and Percolator. These two clusters are among the top three most expensive EMR environments, and their frequent autoscaling patterns require a targeted approach to improve resource efficiency.

Following the rollout, we observed approximately 30% incremental cost savings for both clusters (adjusted for lower weekend usage). These savings fully offset the organic cost increases that had accumulated since February (FY26 Q1), effectively restoring the cost baseline to early-year levels. In other words, this optimization effort allowed us to absorb the anticipated cost growth across FY26 Q1 and Q2—amounting to over $500K in annualized savings to date.

We plan to extend this change to all applicable EMR clusters in the coming weeks.

The following chart shows the daily costs of the DMA cluster (including dea, dma-temp, and insights) since January 2025, indicating that the current cost baseline is lower than it was at the end of FY25 Q4 (See [cost explorer](https://us-east-1.console.aws.amazon.com/costmanagement/home?region=us-east-1#/cost-explorer?chartStyle=STACK&costAggregate=netAmortizedCost&endDate=2025-07-14&excludeForecasting=false&filter=%5B%7B%22dimension%22:%7B%22id%22:%22CostCategoryName%22,%22displayValue%22:%22Cost%20category%22%7D,%22operator%22:%22INCLUDES%22,%22values%22:%5B%7B%22value%22:%22Data%20Infrastructure%22,%22displayValue%22:%22Data%20Infrastructure%22%7D%5D,%22growableValue%22:%7B%22value%22:%22Automatic%20-%20Omni%20Team%20Name%22,%22displayValue%22:%22Automatic%20-%20Omni%20Team%20Name%22%7D%7D,%7B%22dimension%22:%7B%22id%22:%22TagKey%22,%22displayValue%22:%22Tag%22%7D,%22operator%22:%22INCLUDES%22,%22values%22:%5B%7B%22value%22:%22prod-dma-emr6%22,%22displayValue%22:%22prod-dma-emr6%22%7D,%7B%22value%22:%22prod-dea-emr6%22,%22displayValue%22:%22prod-dea-emr6%22%7D,%7B%22value%22:%22prod-dma-temp-emr6%22,%22displayValue%22:%22prod-dma-temp-emr6%22%7D,%7B%22value%22:%22prod-insights-emr6%22,%22displayValue%22:%22prod-insights-emr6%22%7D%5D,%22growableValue%22:%7B%22value%22:%22Name%22,%22displayValue%22:%22Name%22%7D%7D%5D&futureRelativeRange=CUSTOM&granularity=Daily&groupBy=%5B%22TagKeyValue:Name%22%5D&historicalRelativeRange=CUSTOM&isDefault=false&reportArn=arn:aws:ce::122735864621:ce-saved-report%2F917c2af4-d19c-4f95-8345-8269e68cb11a&reportId=917c2af4-d19c-4f95-8345-8269e68cb11a&reportMode=STANDARD&reportName=EMR%2012%20Cluster%20Cost%20Report&showOnlyUncategorized=false&showOnlyUntagged=false&startDate=2025-01-01&usageAggregate=undefined&useNormalizedUnits=false)). The daily cost on June 20, 2025, was $3,060.99, compared to $1,972.52 on June 21, 2025 — a 35% decrease,  equivalent to approximately $397k in annual savings. Additional cost savings were observed between June 7 and June 20, attributed to improved resource efficiency following cluster consolidation.

![][image1]

The following chart shows the daily costs of the Percolator cluster since January 2025, indicating that the current cost baseline matches the level at the end of FY25 Q4. (see [cost explorer](https://us-east-1.console.aws.amazon.com/costmanagement/home?region=us-east-1#/cost-explorer?chartStyle=STACK&costAggregate=netAmortizedCost&endDate=2025-07-14&excludeForecasting=false&filter=%5B%7B%22dimension%22:%7B%22id%22:%22CostCategoryName%22,%22displayValue%22:%22Cost%20category%22%7D,%22operator%22:%22INCLUDES%22,%22values%22:%5B%7B%22value%22:%22Data%20Infrastructure%22,%22displayValue%22:%22Data%20Infrastructure%22%7D%5D,%22growableValue%22:%7B%22value%22:%22Automatic%20-%20Omni%20Team%20Name%22,%22displayValue%22:%22Automatic%20-%20Omni%20Team%20Name%22%7D%7D,%7B%22dimension%22:%7B%22id%22:%22TagKey%22,%22displayValue%22:%22Tag%22%7D,%22operator%22:%22INCLUDES%22,%22values%22:%5B%7B%22value%22:%22prod-percolator-emr6%22,%22displayValue%22:%22prod-percolator-emr6%22%7D%5D,%22growableValue%22:%7B%22value%22:%22Name%22,%22displayValue%22:%22Name%22%7D%7D%5D&futureRelativeRange=CUSTOM&granularity=Daily&groupBy=%5B%22TagKeyValue:Name%22%5D&historicalRelativeRange=CUSTOM&isDefault=false&reportArn=arn:aws:ce::122735864621:ce-saved-report%2F917c2af4-d19c-4f95-8345-8269e68cb11a&reportId=917c2af4-d19c-4f95-8345-8269e68cb11a&reportMode=STANDARD&reportName=EMR%2012%20Cluster%20Cost%20Report&showOnlyUncategorized=false&showOnlyUntagged=false&startDate=2025-01-01&usageAggregate=undefined&useNormalizedUnits=false)). The daily cost on June 20, 2025, was $1,576.13, compared to $1,039.42 on June 21 — a 34% decrease, equivalent to approximately $196K in annual savings.
